description: Veo-only: light wind-down bench chat (no sleep-distress or clinical bedtime framing)
specific_prompts:
[VISUAL PROMPT]:
A peaceful, cozy opening frame. A shepherd pup in blue police-style gear and a small pup in pink flight-style gear sit side-by-side on a wooden bench in a bright public garden, matching the reference start frame layout. The background shows a colorful harbor town: a tall tower on a hill, a town hall–style building, and a calm beach under soft blue skies. The pink pup looks a little sleepy-happy; she rubs an eye with her paw. The blue pup sits beside her in a friendly posture, looking at her gently. Warm late-afternoon light; wholesome slice-of-life cartoon mood.

[DIALOGUE & AUDIO]:
Pink aviator pup (soft, cheerful): "My thoughts were zooming like little planes last night—so many pretend rescues to plan!"
Blue police pup (warm buddy tone): "I get that! I picture one sunny moment from today, take three easy breaths, and let the day land softly."
Pink aviator pup (small smile): "Hehe, I'll borrow that trick—sounds cozy!"
